description: Initialize the Go module and create the full directory structure for the Flywheel project. Run `go mod init github.com/johnayoung/flywheel`. Create all directories under cmd/flywheel/ and internal/ (config, task, lifecycle, store/jsonl, dag, worktree, agent/claudecode, validate, review, merge, conflict, engine). Create cmd/flywheel/main.go with a minimal main function that prints 'flywheel' and exits. Do NOT create any other .go files -- only directories and main.go. Reference docs/implementation-plan.md for the full directory layout.
commit: chore: initialize go module and project directory structure
steps: Create all directories: cmd/flywheel/, internal/config/, internal/task/, internal/lifecycle/, internal/store/, internal/store/jsonl/, internal/dag/, internal/worktree/, internal/agent/, internal/agent/claudecode/, internal/validate/, internal/review/, internal/merge/, internal/conflict/, internal/engine/
Create cmd/flywheel/main.go with package main, a main() that prints 'flywheel'
acceptance_criteria: go.mod exists with module path github.com/johnayoung/flywheel and go 1.23+
All directories from the implementation plan exist
